title: pulicaria vulgaris
intro: Pulicaria vulgaris, also known as common fleabane or yellow fleabane, is a perennial plant native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipruritic properties. The plant's health benefits include the treatment of digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, as well as its use in treating respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. Pulicaria vulgaris can be prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, and it is also used as a topical treatment for skin irritations and wounds.
